reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio. Mi esposa fue al toillette y lo encontró súper limpio. La atención del personal del Full es buenísima, son muy amables y de paso la comida, un 10 para ser comida rápida. Pedimos unas hamburguesas sencillas con papas que la verdad están mejores que las de McDonald's o Mostaza. La hamburguesa hermosa, provoca comerla con verla, muy bien presentada, las papas hermosas y ricas. Todo como en la foto. Lo bueno hay que reconocerlo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. My wife went to the restroom and found it spotless. The staff at Full are incredibly friendly and attentive, and the food is a 10/10 for fast food. We ordered simple hamburgers with fries, which were honestly better than McDonald's or Mostaza. The hamburger looked amazing, so tempting just looking at it, beautifully presented, and the fries were delicious. Everything was just like in the picture. We have to give credit where it's due.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqNTVxMEpnEAE

reviews.comment:
La peor YPF del país. Más fila no se puede. Tienen un montón de surtidores pero atienden muy pero muy lento. Solo les interesa sacar 1 mango por limpiar el parabrisas. Años que la tengo al lado de casa y siempre fue igual.

(Translated by Google)
The worst YPF in the country. The lines are unbelievable. They have tons of pumps, but the service is incredibly slow. They're only interested in making a quick buck cleaning your windshield. I've had it next to my house for years, and it's always been the same.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNqdmVTdVVREAE
